name: Pomodoro Timer
description: Pomodoro timer that cycles work/break intervals with count tracking.
author: MacroPad Team

actions.label: Start/Pause Timer
actions.description: Toggles the Pomodoro timer between running and paused. If idle, starts the work phase.

actions.label: Reset Timer
actions.description: Resets the timer to idle state and clears the cycle count.

actions.label: Set Work Duration
actions.description: Set how many minutes the work phase lasts.

actions.label: Set Break Duration
actions.description: Set how many minutes the break phase lasts.

actions.label: Get Status
actions.description: Broadcasts the current timer state to connected PWA clients.
